outfit_info.outfit_description: A sophisticated smart casual ensemble, featuring a cream knit top layered under a dark grey bomber jacket, paired with olive green drawstring pants and classic leather boat shoes. Accessories include a dark wallet and briefcase, creating a polished yet comfortable look suitable for a leisurely coastal escape.

model_attributes.body: Lean build, neatly groomed, exuding a confident and thoughtful demeanor, fitting the polished, relaxed aesthetic.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright on a wooden pier, looking intently through binoculars towards a distant horizon, engaged and focused.
model_attributes.background: A dramatic sunset sky over a vast, calm ocean, with surreal, stylized sharks circling in the soft, cloud-filled expanse.
